target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely charred with no discernible intact components; structural frame is melted and collapsed; consistent with catastrophic (K-kill) damage.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely charred with no intact structural components; all doors, hood, and frame are melted and collapsed; consistent with catastrophic (K-kill) damage.

summary: Two military equipment targets have been assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence; both are completely charred with no discernible intact components and melted structural frames. The scene depicts a road in a mountainous area with multiple burned-out vehicles, including the two confirmed destroyed ones, and several armed soldiers standing nearby. The likely functional impact is the complete loss of operational capability of the targeted vehicles, consistent with catastrophic damage.
